prompt: Slightly motion-blurred image of a concrete corridor lit by harsh overhead fluorescent tubes. Desaturated muted khaki and grey tones. The motion blur suggests aggressive handheld camera movement. Gritty texture — rough walls, scuffed floor. Sickly green-white fluorescent cast on everything. No people. Raw, unpolished, documentary feel, 16:9, photorealistic.
negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, logo, watermark, collage, split screen, multi-panel, low detail, cluttered composition, extra objects, cartoon, illustration, CGI look, unreadable signage, oversharpening

settings.depth_of_field: controlled depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: high detail, bold shapes, small-size readability
